positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration featuring a playful otter floating on a large, smooth leaf. The otter is rendered in a clean, cartoon-like silhouette with expressive whiskers and a cheerful pose. The surrounding leaves and stylized bubbles should create a whimsical yet sophisticated scene. Color palette should be limited to deep teal, earthy terracotta, and cream for a modern, high-contrast aesthetic. The composition must be centered, suitable for a square print on apparel, emphasizing clean lines and bold shapes. Vector art style, linocut print influence, crisp edges, studio lighting, extremely detailed illustration, high contrast, 4k.
negative: photorealism, blur, noise, grain, text, logo, watermark, jpeg artifacts, messy, dirty, realistic fur, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature, gradient color shift, low contrast, complex background, busy
